column1: Source: Michigan Perkins V / CTE Instructional Design Form (2026)
NOTE: Unit sequence reflects actual Year 1 curriculum — not the AI-generated syllabus which was inaccurate from Unit 3 onward.

column25: Career Ready Practices (Required All CTE — not reported in CTEIS)

column2: Unit Title
Career Ready Practices — Engineering Careers & Financial Literacy
column32: 2-3 day standalone module. Career exploration via BLS.gov (engineering + trades) + paycheck/budget activity + written reflection. Explicitly covers PM1 and PM2; A3/CM via written career plan; CL via partner share-out. Placement TBD — currently placed before Unit 1 for piloting.

column2: Engineering Design Process
column30: Paper glider / spaghetti tower / cell phone stand design brief / Pugh Matrix. EDP = B1-B3-B7 loop. ~2 weeks.

column2: Fundamentals of CAD
column29: Fusion 360: 2D sketching → 3D modeling → assemblies → technical drawings → BOM. ~6 weeks (target: tighten to 3-4). C7 = modeling only.

column2: Rapid Prototyping & Manufacturing
column30: CNC router/mill + 3D printing. Caliper measurement. Tolerance iteration. Version history. Overlapped Unit 2 robot CAD phase.

column2: Shop Safety & Standard Practices
column30: OSHA / LOTO / PPE / SDS / incident analysis (Henne + Lac-Mégantic) / guest speaker (Electrician's Union). ~1 week.

column2: C++ Programming & Electronics Fundamentals
column31: Variables / loops / conditionals / motor control / breadboards / basic circuits. C7 = Wokwi pre-lab simulation. Portfolio system starts here.

column2: Sensors & Robot Behaviors
column31: IR / ultrasonic / line following / PID control. Hardware must be validated on actual motors before teaching. SPLIT from former Unit 5.

column2: Civil Engineering & Structural Challenges
column32: Placement TBD. Structural challenge brief → statics/load calcs → prototype build → load test → report. Only unit covering C4.

column2: Capstone Project
column30: Portfolio R1/R2/R3. Community Engineering / Applied Fabrication / Creative Fabrication tracks. Professional presentation + sustainability reflection.

column2: FIRST Robotics Competition
column30: Reserved for Year 2 — accountability and FIRST season timing coordination needed before re-integrating as coursework.

column2: A1=U2
B1=U1/NEW

Only lightly covered in Unit 1 (intro on Day 2). Needs reinforcement — suggest 1-2 milestone reflection questions per year connecting student work to career interests.
